provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana Meat Commission (Transition) Act, and shall come into operation on such date as the Minister may, by Order published in the Gazette, appoint.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Board of Directors of the Company referred to under section 5
a company established by the Government for the purpose of holding assets from or in respect of, privatised public enterprises, with the object of the economic empowerment of citizens of Botswana
Botswana Meat Commission established under the Botswana Meat Commission Act
Botswana Meat Commission, as continued under section 3
the date on which Botswana Meat Commission is registered as a company
a plan established under section 6 for the benefit of staff of the Company who are citizens
the Botswana Meat Commission Staff Pension Fund which is a defined contribution fund
the Registrar of Companies appointed under the Companies Act (Cap. 42:01)
the Botswana Meat Commission Act repealed under section 13
assigned to it under the Companies Act.
